channel.title: SoundBox on ankitdaf's Space
channel.description: Recent content in SoundBox on ankitdaf's Space

item.title: Making The PhonePe SmartSpeaker
item.description:
I’ve had a lot of fun conversations discussing about what it takes to make a product of the scale and complexity as the PhonePe SmartSpeaker, and when I started writing what it takes, I quickly realised that writing it as a blog post or even a series of blog posts wouldn’t do justice to the complexity and interconnected-ness of everything that goes in.

Luckily, I found the perfect tool for this - a mindmap. I’ve tried to capture the essence of everything that goes into making a product like this. Instead of providing answers (some of which are highly specific to context, and some of which are proprietary), I’ve provided a set of questions to help navigate the complexity of building and maintaining this product.

item.title: PhonePe SmartSpeaker
item.description:
The PhonePe SmartSpeaker provides instant payment confirmation to merchants at their stores in 11 languages.

I led the product launch, and built the foundational experiences that enabled PhonePe to scale rapidly on the field. These include procurement and warranty terms, design of device behaviour and firmware update mechanisms, inventory management and deployment experience for a field team of 7k+ agents, and device management experience design for the end merchants.

I worked with a wide array of platform as well as vertical teams on this project to deliver this on a tight timeline, enabling a deployment of 4 Million devices in a year.
